title: P0-C Industry Batch 2 benchmark baseline
purpose: Provide a minimal but executable before-and-after baseline for the second 5 industry packs without turning evaluation into a new platform.
update_policy: Only update this manifest when the shipped hardening scope for Industry Batch 2 changes.
Do not overwrite historical QA evidence; benchmark scaffold records complement docs/04_qa_matrix.md.
Prefer adding or revising seed cases over expanding into a full scoring platform during P0-C.

cases.title: Manufacturing quality and capacity trade-off
cases.description: Factory business balancing OEE, yield, supplier reliability, working capital, and backlog visibility.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a manufacturing review on OEE, yield, supplier reliability, inventory turns, and whether to expand capacity before fixing quality and backlog visibility.

cases.title: Clinic capacity and compliance mix review
cases.description: Clinic business balancing provider capacity, appointment fill, no-show, revisit, service mix, and compliance.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a clinic operating review on provider utilization, no-show, revisit, service mix margin, and whether to expand appointments before fixing scheduling and compliance.

cases.title: Energy project portfolio governance
cases.description: Energy business balancing project finance, regulation, uptime, and counterparty risk.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an energy project decision on regulatory sequencing, project finance, uptime risk, counterparty exposure, and whether to prioritize portfolio discipline before scaling pipeline.

cases.title: Supplements claim and retention mix
cases.description: Health supplements business balancing repeat purchase, SKU economics, claims compliance, and channel dependence.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a health supplements review on claim compliance, repeat purchase, SKU economics, and whether to simplify the catalog before buying more traffic.

cases.title: Funeral referral trust and capacity
cases.description: Funeral services business balancing trust, referral dependence, compliance, and service capacity.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a funeral services review on referral dependence, service consistency, counselor capacity, contract trust, and whether to expand locations before fixing governance and compliance.
